The cases among Injecting Drug Users (IDU) spiked in 2010 comprising 9% (147) of the total cases reported that year. However, new cases among people who inject drugs decreased to ≤ 6% of the total cases in succeeding years.

The cases among Injecting Drug Users (IDU) spiked in 2010 comprising 9% (147) of the total cases reported that year. However, new cases among people who inject drugs decreased to ≤ 6% of the total cases in succeeding years.
